notes.basic: Stronger with a token start, tura 4 shop RNG weakness. No heropower requirement.
notes.fast-basic: Stronger with a token start, tura 4 shop RNG weakness. No heropower requirement.
notes.jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the gra with its variations.
notes.fast-jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the gra with its variations. Pushes levels quickly.
notes.slow-jeef: Uses tier 1 economy and strong pairs for a flexible start to the gra with its variations. Stays on tier 2 to solidify the board.
notes.warrior: Bardzo wartościowa linia, jeśli ekonomia poziomu 1 i wymuszone trójki są silne.
notes.extended-warrior: Bardzo wartościowa linia, jeśli ekonomia poziomu 1 i wymuszone trójki są silne. Ten wariant jest opcją zapasową, jeśli trójka nie pojawiła się grając zwykłą krzywą wojownika.
notes.basic-yogg: Używa mocy bohatera za 2, aby szybciej dojść do poziomu 3.
notes.aggro-yogg: Używa mocy bohatera za 2, aby zdobyć dobre stronniki poziomu 1 na planszę, zanim szybciej awansujesz na poziom 3.
notes.rafaam: Czyste awansowanie przy użyciu mocy bohatera za 1, mocy bohatera za 2 z ekonomią lub kółkowiczów tawerny
notes.slow-rafaam: Czyste awansowanie przy użyciu mocy bohatera za 1, mocy bohatera za 2 z ekonomią lub kółkowiczów tawerny. Pozostań na poziomie 2, aby się wzmocnić
notes.3-on-3: Sacrifices early health to get very fast access to tier 3 stronnicy, then pushes levels
notes.3-on-3-bis: Sacrifices early health to fill the board with tier 3 stronnicy
notes.4-on-4: Sacrifices early health to get very fast access to tier 3 stronnicy. A fallback option in case of a bad shop after 3 on 3; requires economy
notes.toki: Sposób na wykorzystanie heropowerów o koszcie 1, które nie zapewniają tempa
notes.pocky: Bardzo niszowe zastosowanie dla heropowerów o koszcie 1

third-party.intro: We believe that twoje data belongs to ty, and that ty should be able to synchronize it to other third party websites and help them do whatever they do best with it. We don't get paid for this, but we do get some exposure since they then talk about us :)

vs.pitch: Vicious Syndicate builds a weekly meta report that captures what the meta looks, using both data coming from thousands of gier and insights by top-level players. Ty can visit them {{websiteLink}}
vs.next: If ty decide to contribute to the vS Data Reaper Report, Firestone will anonymously send them info about twoje gier (mostly the kart rozegrano by each gracz and some meta data, like gracz ranks).

ooc.pitch: Out of Gry is a Hearthstone community site with articles, guides, decks, karta database, and more. Syncing twoje karta collection to the site makes it easier to find decks to play. Ty can visit them {{websiteLink}}
ooc.next: If ty connect twoje Out of Gry account, Firestone will send twoje collection data to Out of Gry so ty can use it online.
ooc.toggle-label: Pokaż notification when collection is synchronizeed
ooc.title: Out of Gry

hearthpwn.title: Hearthpwn
hearthpwn.pitch: Hearthpwn is one of the biggest community websites that shares decks, articles, and more. Syncing twoje karta collection to the site makes it easier to find decks to play and view statystyki on twoje collection. Ty can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hearthpwn.next: If ty decide to sync to Hearthpwn, Firestone will send them twoje collection data, so ty can view statystyki on twoje collection.

d0nkey.pitch: hsguru.com is a fan website that gathers all decks from official Hearthstone competitions, as well as decks from streamers to allow anyone to easily find interesting decks to play. Synchronizing to hsguru.com will let ty share twoje decks with twoje audience (if ty're a streamer) or will help them build a better database to provide more free services to the community. Ty can visit them {{websiteLink}}
d0nkey.next: If ty decide to sync to hsguru.com, Firestone will send them each gra ty play, which will appear in a specific section on the website (which is still under construction). The replays will be private by default, unless ty're streaming at the same czas. See the {{link}} for how to set everything up.

hsdecks.pitch: Hearthstone-decks.net shares Talie rozegrano at High Legenda for all constructed modes, News & Articles. Ty can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hsdecks.next: If ty decide to sync to hearthstone-decks.net, Firestone will send them each gra ty play anonymously with some info about twoje gier (Talia Code, Rank, Gra Results)

localization.title: Lokalizacja
localization.text-1: The translation of the app is done by the community, by people like ty who generously put in czas and effort to allow everyone to use the app in the language of their choice. As such, please enjoy and respect their work.
localization.text-11: This also means that not every part of the app will be translated into twoje language. In that case, the missing parts will be displayed in English.
localization.text-2: If ty want to help translate the app, please check out the instructions {{link}}.
localization.text-3: Uruchom ponownie aplikację (klikając prawym przyciskiem myszy ikonę Firestone w zasobniku systemowym), aby nowy język został uwzględniony.

premium.title: Opcje subskrypcji Premium
premium.text-1: Becoming a Premium user is the best way to support the app and the work I do to improve Firestone. In addition, ty get a bunch of features, like Overlay widgets, a website with twoje own Profile page, and much more. Ty can find the details of all the premium features {{link}}.
premium.lottery-block-text1: Taking part in the lottery lets ty accumulate points by doing some actions while playing gier (like spending resources) with the lottery window visible. At the end of every two weeks, 2 winners will be picked at random (the more points ty have, the more chances ty have to win). The winners will get a 2-month Premium subscription, and will be announced on {{twitterLink}} and {{discordLink}}.
premium.lottery-block-text2: Once a new lottery sezon starts, points from previous seasons are reset.
premium.lottery-block-text3: Note: if ty have multiple screens, try to toggle the "Set Overlay" setting off in the widget, and move it to a second screen.
premium.lottery-block-text4: Note: if ty're a Premium user, opting in the lottery WILL NOT show ty ads - and if ty win, we'll see together for a prize of equivalent value.
premium.lottery-premium-section-tooltip: Ta sekcja jest dostępna tylko dla użytkowników Premium

data.remote-intro-text: Firestone stores most of twoje data online, to make it easy to use it across different computers. Some of that data is cached locally to improve the loading czas of the app and reduce the bandwidth usage. Ty can however force a refresh of that data with the buttons below, typically after ty've switched computers.
data.export-settings-button-tooltip: Export twoje ustawienia to a file, which ty can then import on another computer
data.import-settings-button-tooltip: Import twoje ustawienia from a file, which ty might have exported from another computer
data.disable-local-cache-tooltip: Wyłącz the local cache of twoje gier. This will force the app to retrieve all twoje gier from the server, which will slow down the loading of the app a bit. Disabling the local cache will also clear the existing cache.
data.clear-local-cache-tooltip: Clear twoje full local cache, meaning all the data will be retrieved from the server the next czas ty start the app. Use this if ty've rozegrano without Firestone on.
data.total-games: The app has retrieved a łącznie of {{value}} gier
data.packs-tooltip: Refresh twoje packs. This is automatically done every 7 days.
data.games-tooltip: Refresh twoje gier. It will retrieve all twoje gier since ty started using the app, and it might take a while
data.clear-games-tooltip: Clear twoje gier, and reload the latest gier based on twoje preferences (last 100 days by default, ty can change that by enabling the Advanced Ustawienia). This might be useful if ty have a lot of gier and feel that the app is using too much RAM
